crossComponentPatterns.radius: Use the single shared --radius token and derived large control corners for a rounded but not playful UI.
crossComponentPatterns.spacing: Keep compact dashboard density using the global spacing unit and quiet vertical rhythm.
crossComponentPatterns.border: Rely on subtle border separation instead of shadows.
crossComponentPatterns.stateModel: Primary actions use the brand blue, secondary actions use muted surfaces, destructive states map to destructive tokens.

warnings: Component structures are inferred from the token system because the source file only defined tokens and theme mappings.
